$comment: Copy to bdt.config.json and edit. The recorder walks up from cwd to find this file.

relay.$comment_username: Your Minecraft gamertag — the relay registers this player.
relay.$comment_profilesFolder: Where bedrock-protocol caches account profiles (Xbox auth, certs). Anywhere writable works.

bdsPaths.$comment_base: Where minecraft-bedrock-server auto-downloads BDS. Anywhere writable works.
